analysis_result: HSC1λ-gPTCH1 mean = 78.12 (SD 18.88, n=8) vs HSC1λ-gGFP = 0.00, Welch's t-test p=7.51e-06.
discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Model mean 78.12 for HSC1λ-gPTCH1 matches reported ~81 within 3.6% relative difference (well within ±10% threshold). Control group mean (0) matches exactly. Both p-values are highly significant (reported p<0.0001; model p=7.51e-06), supporting the same biological conclusion that PTCH1 knockout dramatically increases transwell migration relative to GFP control. Denominators (n=8 per group) match.
